---
name: ✨ Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement for ClawGuard
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem Statement

What problem does this feature solve? Is it related to an existing frustration?

## Proposed Solution

A clear description of what you want to happen.

## Use Case

Describe a concrete scenario where this feature would be useful.

## Alternatives Considered

What other approaches have you thought about? Why is this one preferred?

## Additional Context

Any relevant examples, links, screenshots, or references (e.g., OWASP guidelines, research papers).
